auto_fails: decorative_mascot: Data only perches: he slides along the top edge of the filling waffle (hook@0.3 → seg1:end) then stands on the fossil bar unchanged from seg2:start through payoff@-0.4 — no setup→action→payoff, no prop, he is a position marker.

junk_imagery.evidence: No photos or AI cutouts anywhere — every beat is vector chart art (waffle grid at seg0:mid, bars at seg2:start); the only foreign object is an empty cyan ellipse annotation at seg1:mid, a graphic bug not stock imagery.

decorative_mascot.evidence: Data only perches: he slides along the top edge of the filling waffle (hook@0.3 → seg1:end) then stands on the fossil bar unchanged from seg2:start through payoff@-0.4 — no setup→action→payoff, no prop, he is a position marker.

bare_number_card.evidence: Every stat is embodied — 100 squares filling by source at seg1:end, and two racing fill-bars at seg2:mid; the 59.1%/40.9% numerals at payoff@-1.8 sit inside the bars they describe.

dead_air.evidence: Measured longest_static_s = 0.0; frames keep changing (bars grow seg2:start → seg2:end), though payoff@-1.8 → seg3:end → payoff@-0.4 are near-identical apart from a mascot twitch.

empty_void.evidence: dark_fraction = 0.0 and the frame carries multiple large elements (grid + legend column at seg0:end; two full-width bars at seg2:mid), but the band above the bars and below them at seg2:start is unused space.

one_line: A sound 100-square waffle metaphor is undermined by broken text/legend collisions and a mascot who does nothing but ride the fill line.
problems: Hook is corrupted by overlapping type: hook@0.3 renders 'Here's how' on top of a leftover 'al', and hook@0.8/seg0:start show 'the entire' colliding with ghost glyphs — the first two seconds look like a rendering bug, not a hook.
Kicker text collides with the legend column: seg0:end reads 'last year:Coal' as one mashed string, and at hook@1.5 the 'Coal' legend label sits directly on top of the fading headline.
The 'Coal' legend entry is missing entirely for the first ~1s (hook@0.3 lists only Gas/Hydro/Nuclear/Wind) while purple coal squares are already filling — the legend contradicts the chart.
A stray empty cyan ellipse floats beside the 'Gas' legend at seg1:mid, and the '22%' callout lands on top of the caption 'But hydro, nuclear' — two unrelated overlays fighting for the same space.
Data is decoration: he perches on the waffle frontier for scenes 1–2 and stands motionless on the fossil bar from seg2:start to payoff@-0.4 with no bit tied to the tipping-point stat.
Scene 2's fossil-vs-clean bars are a generic two-progress-bar layout — the 'under 60 percent for the first time since the 1940s' punchline gets no visual event, the bars simply stop.
Payoff is flat: payoff@-1.8, seg3:end and payoff@-0.4 are the same frame with a micro mascot shift, so the closing line lands on a still image.
Measured cadence is laggy — duplicate_ratio 0.513 and effective_fps 11.7 with a 9-frame duplicate run means the fill animations judder rather than flow.
fixes: Fix the title-card crossfade so outgoing and incoming words never co-exist (hook@0.3, hook@0.8) — hard-cut the kicker or offset it, and clear the previous string's glyph buffer.
Reserve a right-hand gutter for the legend column and clamp the kicker text width so 'last year' can never overprint 'Coal' (seg0:end); render the legend above the kicker in z-order.
Populate all five legend rows (including Coal) at t=0 so the key matches the squares that are already filling at hook@0.3.
Delete the empty ellipse annotation at seg1:mid, or attach it to the block it is meant to circle, and move the '22%' badge into the chart area so it stops colliding with the subtitle.
Give Data a real bit in scene 1: have him try to carry/stack the coal squares, get buried as the purple block reaches 34, then climb out — setup, action, payoff, tied to the stat.

Replace the static bar stop in scene 2 with an event at 60 percent: put a physical 60% line on the fossil track and have the bar visibly fall short of it while Data pushes against it — that is the '1940s' punchline made visible.
Animate the final reveal: count the 59.1 / 40.9 numerals up as the bars settle and have Data tip or slide with the crossover, so payoff@-1.8 → payoff@-0.4 is a move, not a held frame.
Raise the source animation rate to the export fps (or interpolate) so the waffle fill and bar growth stop duplicating frames — target an effective unique-frame rate near 24, not 11.7.
